content:
✨ gridland | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Developing cross-platform terminal user interfaces (TUIs) that can be deployed as both standalone command-line applications and web applications.
✨ Key Features: • Build terminal apps that run in the browser • React integration for UI development • Built on OpenTUI rendering engine • Quick start with `create-gridland` • Interactive demos
📖 Summary: Gridland is a TypeScript framework for building terminal applications that can also run seamlessly in web browsers. It leverages the OpenTUI rendering engine and provides React components for creating interactive command-line interfaces.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
